test.name: TestPostgresLiveLogicalBackupRestoreAndIntegrity
assertions: source migration checksum and complete repository integrity pass before backup
private PostgreSQL URL is decomposed into child-only libpq environment variables rather than process arguments
custom archive contains only ynx_fabric and ynx_analytics schemas and is hash/byte/catalog verified
restore refuses a target that already contains either Data Fabric schema
empty-target restore executes in one transaction
restored migration checksum, event signatures/order, Ledger balance/links, Inbox lineage, analytics fact, and record counts pass
a second restore refuses to overwrite the restored target

limitations: transient archive from an isolated local test database; the archive itself is not retained as a release artifact
write-maintenance is explicitly asserted by the operator but not coordinated by a distributed maintenance controller
not encrypted, remotely stored, immutable, production-sized, replica/PITR tested, or timed as an approved RTO/RPO drill
not clean-commit, CI, staging, public, or independent evidence
